data.body:
Auto-lander epic (f1fa) plan-review remediation — multi-round.

DONE (residual round the user scoped): S2/S4/S5 + epic AC1/AC8 stale "autolander-bot/bot-only vote ACL" → Contributors/requester-votable; S4→S5 heartbeat interface dep; CONTRIBUTING §FFO → §2e/ADR-0040; removed S4→ADR-0042 forward-ref; S5 existing-file edit targets (## Files + file_impact); pinned poll interval 15s / heartbeat staleness 90s / histogram buckets. Then re-review caught my REST/FFO disambiguation was INVERTED — corrected per ADR-0040 (behind-tip = NON-submittable, not submittable=True).

RE-REVIEW verdicts @ head 2d1524ad: epic PASS(adv 11, signed then re-staled by AC1/AC8 edit); S2 BLOCK(8/20); S4 BLOCK(4/20); S5 BLOCK(15/20).

USER DIRECTIVE (current): fix all VALID feedback that needs no design decision; surface design decisions ONE AT A TIME to decide together.

TRIAGE — INVALID findings (justify, do not apply):
- S2 BLOCK T1 "/rebase:chain doesn't exist" — INVALID. Verified vs Gerrit REST docs: POST /changes/{id}/rebase:chain DOES exist (3.6+; 3.14.1 has it). Its own advisory T3 concedes this. Keep endpoint; write precise path.

MECHANICAL fixes (apply now):
- S2: on_behalf_of_uploader → rebase_on_behalf_of_uploader (RebaseInput field, per docs); precise path POST /changes/{id}/rebase:chain; rebase:chain requires linear ancestry; FIFO field = DETAILED_LABELS→ApprovalInfo.date; wipChain add re_drive_count + per-member tested SHAs; chain: ALL members fresh Verified before submit; ancestor-atomic = POST /changes/{tip}/submit (submitWholeTopic); chain FFO-landability = bottom-most member parent == main tip; bot Submit-on-refs/heads/* precondition (xref S5 AC2); name file infra/autolander/loop.py; bounded Verified-await (default 30m, config); add testing AC; reconcile Scope wording (TOCTOU re-drive is core-loop, not S3 failure path).
- S4: heartbeat checked BEFORE setting Autosubmit (no orphan label) [mechanical correctness]; GET /changes/{id}?o=DETAILED_LABELS for votes; pending exit code; error exit code pinned; JSON schema in land-contract.md (AC7); name file infra/autolander/land.py; land-status fallback-precedence applies; land-status on never-submitted → defined; thresholds config note; heartbeat-read failure → lander_down (conservative).
- S5: declare named state volume external:true + compose-up.sh SITE_SUBDIRS (incident-2731 drift gate) as edit target; unhealthy detection = docker events/inspect NOT journald grep [factual]; HEALTHCHECK probes LOCAL heartbeat freshness (not Gerrit, avoid flap); env var AUTOLANDER_GERRIT_TOKEN into shared .env; ssm.tf add to for_each local.rebar_secret_params w/ ignore_changes; add `paused` to phase enum (xref S2); drain SIGTERM timeout bound; reconcile Scope ("service-lifecycle behaviors" owned here vs core loop in S2); AC5/6/7 file targets; testing AC; All-Projects [capability] provisioning script named.

DESIGN DECISIONS to surface one at a time (do NOT decide alone):
1. Park/hand-back protocol after N=5 re-drive + S2/S3 ownership boundary (mechanism to surface needs_rebase: S3 marker + remove Autosubmit + Gerrit msg? terminal phase value?).
2. Heartbeat interface FORM: timestamp file in state volume vs health metric (cross S4+S5, load-bearing).
3. CloudWatch histogram transport for time-to-land (no native buckets): StatisticValues+extended stats vs per-bucket counts vs log-metric-filter — determines whether pinned buckets survive.
4. unhealthy→restart mechanism: autoheal sidecar vs restart:on-failure+exit vs docker-events listener.
5. land CLI Gerrit-client: reuse src/rebar/review_bot/gerrit_client.py vs project-tooling mini-client (plan currently forbids importing src/rebar).
6. Agent Gerrit credential injection for the land CLI (how the agent's HTTP cred reaches land).
7. AC6 queue-status surface transport + emergency-stop sentinel form (bundle: log/metric/file/HTTP + sentinel path/contents).

Epic advisory residual beyond scope: /rebase:chain notation (defended), ADR-0042 split ownership S1/S6, S3's stale S9 consumer ref.
